title: The Q3 Earnings Season Gets Underway
text: The Q3 reporting cycle has begun, with results from 16 S&P 500 members out as of September 29th. But the cycle will really pick up steam when the big banks start coming out with their quarterly numbers in mid-October.

title: Meat-processor stocks fall after DoJ brings antitrust suit against data provider Agri Stats
text: The Justice Department has filed a civil antitrust lawsuit against meat data provider Agri Stats, charging it with organizing and managing anticompetitive information exchanges among broiler chicken, pork and turkey processors.

title: Conagra Brands (CAG) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
text: Conagra Brands (CAG) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Conagra Brands: If Only Cheap Were Enough Of A Reason
text: Conagra Brands shares have been trading in a stagnant range since 2021, with low earnings multiples and high leverage. The company's growth has been driven by pricing rather than volume, raising concerns about the composition of growth. Corporate activism or divestment of assets may be needed to improve the company's performance and attract investors.

title: Why Conagra Brands (CAG) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Conagra Brands (CAG) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Conagra Brands Foundation Awards Grants to 20 Local Nonprofits Through "Nourish Our Community" Program
text: Employee-driven program fosters local impact throughout Hunger Action Month CHICAGO , Sept. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- In support of Hunger Action Month and its commitment to combating food insecurity, the Conagra Brands Foundation has announced the 2023 recipients of the "Nourish Our Community" grants.

title: Conagra Brands Announces Appointment of Francisco Fraga to its Board of Directors
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) today announced that Francisco Fraga, 50, has been elected to its board of directors at its annual meeting of shareholders held earlier today.

title: Conagra Brands: The Parts Are Worth More Than The Whole
text: Conagra Brands's operating and financial performance have both stagnated in recent years, weighing on share prices. The company's portfolio of brands is highly desirable, including names like Hunt's, Slim Jim, Marie Callender's, and more. CAG's potential could be unlocked through strategic transactions, such as divestitures or sales of assets, which could offer substantial upside to shareholders.

title: Conagra Brands' Cash Flow Increases The Safety Of Its Dividend Yield
text: Conagra Brands Inc. (CAG) is the featured stock in August's Safest Dividend Yields Model Portfolio.

title: CONAGRA BRANDS ANNOUNCES DETAILS OF FISCAL 2024 FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS RELEASE, WEBCAST AND CONFERENCE CALL
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) will host a webcast and conference call to review its fiscal 2024 first quarter results on Thursday, Oct. 5, 2023, at 9:30 a.m.

title: Conagra's (CAG) Pricing & Innovation Aid, Inflated Costs Hurt
text: Conagra (CAG) benefits from pricing and a focus on the frozen and snacks categories amid cost inflation and elevated SG&A expenses.

title: Conagra Brands recalls over 245K pounds of Banquet frozen chicken strips meals after plastic contamination
text: More than 245,000 pounds of Banquet frozen chicken strips meals have been recalled by Conagra Brands, Inc. following concerns of plastic contamination after an oral injury was reported.
